content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
RISK-ON: Low volatility (Vol: 17.2%) and broad participation (Breadth: 6/8 sectors positive), constructive for cyclicals and risk assets.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Retail & Food is leading: SOKM (1W: +15.96% | 1M: +5.91%) ABOVE TREND, CCOLA (1W: +6.25% | 1M: +9.16%) ABOVE TREND. Construction & REIT and Heavy Industry follow: TKFEN (1W: +11.54% | 1M: +6.38%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +17.09% | 1M: +8.47%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Banking & Finance is the clear laggard with broad weakness: HALKB (1W: -7.77% | 1M: -21.20%) BELOW TREND, YKBNK (1W: -7.36% | 1M: -18.78%) BELOW TREND. Transportation is weak/underperforming: THYAO (1W: -2.59% | 1M: +2.41%) CORRECTION.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
KRDMD (1W: +17.09% | 1M: +8.47%) ABOVE TREND; SOKM (1W: +15.96% | 1M: +5.91%) ABOVE TREND; TKFEN (1W: +11.54% | 1M: +6.38%) ABOVE TREND; PETKM (1W: +10.09% | 1M: +4.28%) ABOVE TREND; TUPRS (1W: +9.46% | 1M: +27.59%) ABOVE TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
HALKB (1W: -7.77% | 1M: -21.20%) BELOW TREND; YKBNK (1W: -7.36% | 1M: -18.78%) BELOW TREND; TRALT (1W: -6.16% | 1M: +4.99%) CORRECTION; GUBRF (1W: -5.49% | 1M: -18.38%) BELOW TREND; AKBNK (1W: -5.27% | 1M: -14.74%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
Biggest 1W movers to monitor: KRDMD (1W: +17.09% | 1M: +8.47%) ABOVE TREND, SOKM (1W: +15.96% | 1M: +5.91%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +11.54% | 1M: +6.38%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: -7.77% | 1M: -21.20%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Broad downside; core names remain BELOW TREND — AKBNK (1W: -5.27% | 1M: -14.74%) BELOW TREND, GARAN (1W: -2.54% | 1M: -10.07%) BELOW TREND, ISCTR (1W: -1.58% | 1M: -8.43%) BELOW TREND — avoid adding exposure until price action confirms stabilization.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Industrial cycle intact with leadership in steel and construction: EREGL (1W: +5.69% | 1M: +7.46%) ABOVE TREND, KRDMD (1W: +17.09% | 1M: +8.47%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +11.54% | 1M: +6.38%) ABOVE TREND; selective autos in RECOVERY (FROTO (1W: +3.40% | 1M: -6.64%) RECOVERY).

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Mixed but positive momentum: TUPRS (1W: +9.46% | 1M: +27.59%) ABOVE TREND, PETKM (1W: +10.09% | 1M: +4.28%) ABOVE TREND; watch SASA (1W: +6.58% | 1M: -11.31%) RECOVERY and GUBRF (1W: -5.49% | 1M: -18.38%) BELOW TREND for dispersion.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Risk-on tilt: overweight Retail & Heavy Industry and selective Energy names; underweight Banking and lagging Transportation until earnings/catalysts re-anchor sentiment.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
KRDMD (1W: +17.09% | 1M: +8.47%) ABOVE TREND, TUPRS (1W: +9.46% | 1M: +27.59%) ABOVE TREND, SOKM (1W: +15.96% | 1M: +5.91%) ABOVE TREND, HALKB (1W: -7.77% | 1M: -21.20%) BELOW TREND — watch follow-through or mean-reversion.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Retail & Food and Heavy Industry for momentum continuation; Banking for signs of capitulation or stabilization that would broaden the rally.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
XU100 is in a risk-on posture — watch near-term support at recent swing lows and resistance at the prior YTD highs for validation; macro catalysts: CPI prints, CBRT messaging, global oil moves and corporate earnings/updates.

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

Low volatility and broad sector participation have established a RISK-ON backdrop favoring cyclicals (Retail, Heavy Industry, Energy). Banks remain the weakest pocket and the primary risk if sentiment shifts; monitor TUPRS, KRDMD and SOKM for continuation and HALKB/AKBNK for potential mean-reversion or further downside.
